observe_daily.description: Daily observation scoring - runs all observers to capture conversation quality metrics

analyze_weekly.description: Weekly failure analysis + hypothesis generation - analyzes accumulated observations to identify patterns

experiment_daily.description: Daily experiment evaluation + deployment - evaluates active experiments and deploys winners

meta_monthly.description: Monthly meta-learning review - analyzes the improvement process itself

full_weekly.description: Full loop every Monday midnight - complete improvement cycle

installation_instructions.note: To install these cron jobs, run: crontab -e and add the schedule lines above with their corresponding commands
